name: Mastercard
confidenceReason: Same duopoly dynamics as Visa. Asset-light perfection. But insufficient volatility for the 2x leverage simulation target.
bullCase: The ultimate inflation-protected toll roads. Processing billions of transactions with effectively zero marginal cost of operation yields supreme pricing power.
bearCase: Mature global penetration results in highly predictable, low-volatility compounding. Inadequate for a synthetic leverage strategy requiring violent upside velocity.
